summary: Comprehensive testing of PO Draft to Incoming Supply conversion feature (iteration_75). All 10 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. Backend endpoint POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/create-incoming-supply successfully converts PO draft lines to planned incoming supply records. Duplicate prevention (409), archived draft rejection (422), and supply creation status indicator all working correctly.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/create-incoming-supply - successful conversion creates incoming supply records with status=planned
Backend: Duplicate prevention - calling create-incoming-supply on already-converted draft returns 409
Backend: Archived draft rejection - calling create-incoming-supply on archived draft returns 422
Backend: Draft flag update - after conversion, draft document has incoming_supply_created=true
Backend: Impact on derive_balances - new planned supply appears in balance calculations (incoming column increases)
Backend REGRESSION: Action Center endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: PO Drafts list endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Incoming supply list endpoint still works
Frontend: PO Drafts tab visible and shows 15 drafts
Frontend: PO Drafts list table shows 'Supply' badge next to status for converted drafts (green badge with truck icon)
Frontend: PO Draft detail drawer shows 'Supply Created' badge for converted drafts
Frontend: PO Draft detail drawer shows green info box with conversion timestamp and supply record count for converted drafts
Frontend: 'Create Incoming Supply' button is hidden for already converted drafts
Frontend: 'Create Incoming Supply' button is hidden for archived drafts
Frontend: Action Center multi-select and Generate PO Draft button work correctly
Frontend: Incoming tab shows planned supply records with PO-DRAFT source references
Frontend: Dashboard summary shows 400 Incoming, correctly reflecting planned supply records
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1031-1125: POST /po-drafts/{id}/create-incoming-supply correctly creates incoming supply records via create_incoming service function with status='planned'
Backend correctly marks draft with incoming_supply_created=true, incoming_supply_created_at timestamp, and incoming_supply_ids array after conversion
Backend correctly returns 409 for duplicate conversion attempts using incoming_supply_created flag check
Backend correctly returns 422 for archived draft conversion attempts
Frontend PODraftsPanel (line ~1168) correctly shows green Supply badge for converted drafts using incoming_supply_created flag
Frontend PODraftDetailDrawer (line ~1252) correctly shows/hides Create Incoming Supply button based on canConvert condition (not converted AND not archived AND has lines)
Frontend conversion result display shows processed/created/skipped counts with item-level status messages
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Already converted draft: PO-DRAFT-20260314163256-689B67 (2 lines: TEST-ITEM-WARN, SPAM-LITE). Second converted draft: PO-DRAFT-20260314170144-8ED5A8 (1 line: TEST-ITEM-WARN). Multiple archived drafts available for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Draft to Incoming Supply conversion feature fully tested. New endpoint: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/create-incoming-supply. Creates planned incoming supply records for each draft line. Returns conversion result with rows_processed, rows_created, rows_skipped, created_supply_ids, and messages array. Updates draft with incoming_supply_created=true flag. Frontend shows green 'Supply' badge in PO Drafts list for converted drafts, and 'Supply Created' badge + green info box in detail drawer. Create Incoming Supply button hidden for converted/archived drafts. Incoming supply records reference the PO draft ID in source_reference field (e.g., 'PO-DRAFT-20260314163256-689B67'). Planned supply shows in Incoming tab and counts toward dashboard 'Incoming' total. Balance calculations include planned incoming supply.

errors.409: This PO draft has already been converted to incoming supply

side_effects: Creates incoming supply records with status='planned'
Updates draft document: incoming_supply_created=true, incoming_supply_created_at, incoming_supply_ids[]

po_drafts_list_supply_badge.appearance: Green badge with truck icon, text 'Supply'

po_draft_detail_supply_created_badge.appearance: Green badge with truck icon, text 'Supply Created'

content: Per-item status with supply_id and qty
